---
applyTo: "**/*"
description: "Code review standards for this repository"
---
# Code Review Guidelines

Follow the repository instructions in .github/copilot-instructions.md.

## Review Priorities
- Critical: security issues, correctness bugs, data loss risks, breaking changes.
- Important: missing tests for critical paths, performance regressions, major architecture violations.
- Suggestion: readability, small refactors, style consistency, documentation gaps.

## Review Focus Areas
- Correctness and edge cases.
- Readability and maintainability.
- Test coverage and determinism.
- Security and privacy concerns.
- Performance impact and bundle size.
- Documentation updates for user visible changes.

## Review Tone
- Be concise, specific, and constructive.
- Provide clear suggestions and rationale.
- Acknowledge good practices when present.
